name: Vintage Camera
description: A classic 35mm film camera from the 1970s in excellent working condition. Comes with original leather case.

name: Antique Clock
description: Beautiful Victorian-era mantel clock with original brass fittings. Fully restored and running perfectly.

name: Collectible Coin
description: Rare 1922 silver dollar in near-mint condition. Graded MS-63 by PCGS. A must-have for serious collectors.

name: Signed Cricket Bat
description: Willow cricket bat signed by the 2011 World Cup winning Indian team. Comes with certificate of authenticity.
